item.title: Walkthrough Customising Entra External ID for Power Pages
item.description: In this blog post, we walk through the process of customising the login experience for Power Pages using Entra External ID. We’ll show how to apply branding to the sign-in screen to make it look and feel like your organisation, creating a seamless experience for external users.

item.title: Power Platform Clinic – Episode 4: Power Pages Authentication Options and Developer Accounts
item.description: In Episode 2 of Power Platform Clinic, Ian Tweedy and Duncan Boyne explore the different authentication options for Power Pages and guide you through how to set up your own developer account for Power Platform experimentation and learning.
